title: Current Issues in Immunization Webinar Series | Vaccine Trainings | CDC
text:
ebinar Series 
Oct. 31, 2024 
About 
Current Issues in Immunization Webinars (CIIW) are 1-hour presentations designed to provide clinicians with the most up-to-date information on immunization.
Overview 
CDC schedules CIIW presentations throughout the year to provide clinicians with the most up-to-date immunization information. Topics focus on what's new in the world of immunization, such as updated guidance and recommendations or new products. Each webinar includes a question-and-answer session.
Continuing education is available for 30 days after each presentation.
